properties.description: The sampled water body or mesocosm (sosa:FeatureOfInterest ⊑ prov:Entity). Represented as a GeoJSON Feature.
GeoJSON geometry of the sampling location

ISO 8601 time interval of the sampling campaign (e.g. '2022-06-28/2022-07-01'). The sosa:phenomenonTime is the time the observed property values apply to the featureOfInterest — not necessarily when the observation was recorded.
URI or name of the sensor / observer. sosa:madeBySensor ⊑ prov:wasAssociatedWith. The sensor is a sosa:Sensor ⊑ prov:Agent.

The individual sosa:Observation instances that form this collection. Each member is itself a prov:Activity that generates one sosa:Result (prov:Entity) for one sosa:ObservableProperty of the featureOfInterest. Per the spec each Observation must have exactly one observedProperty and at least one hasResult.

URI of the sosa:ObservableProperty being measured. Use one of:
  https://mwj.example.org/plankton/obs/phytoplanktonDensity
  https://mwj.example.org/plankton/obs/zooplanktonDensity
  https://mwj.example.org/plankton/obs/nutrientLevel
  https://mwj.example.org/plankton/obs/fishPredationPressure
The sosa:Result of this individual Observation (prov:Entity wasGeneratedBy this Observation prov:Activity).

Unit of measure. Expected values:
  'mg.dw/l'     for X1, X2
  'relative'    for N
  'mg.dw/d/l'   for F
ISO 8601 timestamp when this individual observation was completed (sosa:resultTime). The resultTime of the first member becomes t=0 of the linked SimulationRun.
URI of the sosa:Procedure (measurement protocol) used for this individual observation. sosa:usedProcedure ⊑ prov:used. Optional; omit if using a generic field sampling protocol.
Optional spatial perturbation applied to the homogeneous initial condition to seed pattern formation in the PDE simulation.
